account.a: Click “Forgot password” on the login page to reset via phone verification.
Go to Settings to update your nickname, avatar and other info.
Contact support to submit a deletion request, processed within 3 business days.

payment.a: WeChat Pay, Alipay, Stripe credit card and USDC.
Contact support within 7 days of subscription for a full refund.
Click “Cancel subscription” on the pricing page. Billing stops next cycle.

project.a: Click “New Project” in the workspace and enter a name.
Free plan: 1 project. Pro and above: unlimited.
Open project details and click “Share” to generate a link.

ai.a: GPT-4, Claude 3.5, Gemini and more. Pro unlocks all models.
Use the model selector at the top of the chat page.

tech.q: How to get an API Key?
tech.a: Create an app on the Developer platform to get an API Key.
Default 60 requests/min. Enterprise can request higher limits.
Official SDKs for Python, Node.js and Go.
